data.content: Shipment review passed. Commit 48fa904f4ed8 is on main, CI runs 23646866442 and 23646866423 both green. Change is scoped to beat-detail.tsx only (3 lines removed). BeatTypeBadge import and render removed from BeatDetailHeader; other consumers (beat-column-defs, wave-planner-sections, stories) unaffected. No invariants defined. No regressions detected.
